problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: If mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression is applied to or, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
